visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with glasses and a serious expression. He is wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a collared shirt. The lighting is dim and cool-toned, casting shadows on his face. The background is dark and indistinct. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame. The camera remains static, holding the tight shot on the man's face. A man speaks in a calm, measured, and serious tone, his voice low and steady. He delivers his line with a sense of finality and gravity, as if stating an inescapable truth. "出来跑，无论做过什么..." (Translation: "Come out and run, no matter what you've done..."). The scene cuts to a medium close-up of a different man. He is wearing a denim shirt over a dark t-shirt. He looks down and to his left with a somber and contemplative expression. The lighting is similarly dim and cool, highlighting the side of his face. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. New white Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. The camera is static. The shot changes
